content.en:
Holy Soul Realm.

One by one, the strongest domain ancestors shuttled in, but because it was a random teleportation, the location of each person's teleportation was different.

Ye Tian appeared in a forest in the Holy Soul Realm, and there was only one Supreme Domain Ancestor around, and he did not sense the existence of other Supreme Domain Ancestors.

Obviously, he was far away from the other Supreme Domain Ancestors.

Rumble!!!!

A powerful aura flew from afar.

"Top Domain Ancestor-level creatures!"

Ye Tian sensed it.

"Copy the talent, probe!"

Race: Holy Soul Wolf Clan

Bloodline Talent: Advanced

Source Force Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Source Talent: Super God (Extreme)

Source Talent: Super God Level (Extreme)

Holy Endowment: Great Force

......

Judging from the situation of copying talent exploration, this Holy Soul Wolf Clan has a holy endowment.

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian was stunned.

Why did this Holy Soul Wolf Clan possess the Holy Endowment? Could it be that it was a descendant of a Superior Domain Ancestor?

"No, the Holy Soul Realm has been opened more than once, and there is no Superior Domain Ancestor here, otherwise how would the Ancestors dare to put us juniors here!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, the weakest of the Holy Soul Beasts here is only the powerful invincible domain ancestor combat power, and they will not have the existence of a superior domain ancestor.

Therefore, how could a Holy Soul Talented Holy Soul Beast be born here?

"Strange, so weird!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, there are too many mysterious things in the Dark Forbidden Realm, and it is normal for the Primordial Ancestral Realm, as the first Ancestral Realm of the Dark Sacred Realm, to have some special circumstances.

"Copy the Great Power Divine Endowment!"

Ye Tian's copy was successful.

Immediately, with a wave of his hand, the Golden Silk Holy Technique tore apart the body of the Holy Soul Wolf Clan, killing it in an instant.

A Holy Soul Wolf Clan with a Holy Endowment has fallen, if it is in the outside world, the fall of such a Holy Endowment is afraid that it will cause a shocking sensation.

But here, it didn't make any waves.

As soon as this Holy Soul Beast died, a wisp of Holy Soul power poured into Ye Tian's body and was absorbed by his soul.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to refine the power of this holy soul and strengthen his soul holy light.

After a few months, Ye Tian had completely refined the power of the Holy Soul, and the Holy Light of the Soul had also grown a little.

"It's really useful, if I kill enough Holy Soul Beasts, my Soul Holy Light will progress very quickly, and in this Holy Soul Realm, I may really be able to completely condense the Holy Soul!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled through the air, and soon found another Holy Soul Beast, this Holy Soul Beast was stronger, with the realm of the strongest domain ancestor, and it also had a holy endowment.

【Holy Endowment: Shooting Star】

This is a speed class.

"Copy the Meteor Gift!"

Ye Tian succeeded in copying and killed this holy soul beast.

Subsequently, he absorbed the power of the Holy Soul after the death of the Holy Soul Beast and strengthened the Soul Holy Light.

I have to say that this Holy Soul Beast of the Supreme Domain Ancestral Realm contains more Holy Soul power, and the effect is even better.

But at this time, Ye Tian was still very puzzled, why did the two Holy Soul Beasts he encountered possess holy endowments?

"Could it be that the Holy Soul Beast is a Saint-endowed clan?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If this is the case, then he can completely copy countless holy endowments, and the holy endowment and the holy endowment can be fused, and he did not fuse the holy endowment before, because there are too few copies of the holy endowment, and the fusion is useless.

But if you have countless holy endowments, once they are fused, will you give birth to the talents above the holy endowments?

Although the non-superior domain ancestors of the battle gate have all said that the Holy Endowment is the limit, the non-superior Domain Ancestors may not know everything, they may just not have seen the talent above the Holy Endowment, maybe there really is any ancestral endowment?

"Hahahaha, this is really my blessed land! even if I didn't form a talent beyond the Holy Endowment this time, but with so many Holy Endowments, it will be easier for me to cultivate the Holy Technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, Ye Tian hunted the Holy Soul Beast to absorb the power of the Holy Soul and strengthen his own Soul Holy Light while copying the Holy Fu.

As he guessed, the Holy Soul Beasts here all possessed Holy Endowments.

The only pity is that these Holy Soul Beasts don't know the Holy Gift, and can only simply use the Holy Endowment to display their strength, which is a complete waste of the Holy Endowment.

Of course, above the same level, the strength of the Holy Soul Beast is still beating ordinary cultivators, and only a true genius can compete with the Holy Soul Beast of the same level.

For example, the Supreme Domain Ancestor Holy Soul Beast that Ye Tian encountered before, but in terms of strength, I am afraid that it has the second-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor's combat power, and if it is a weak Supreme Domain Ancestor, it will really be killed by the Holy Soul Beast in seconds.

It's a pity that in Ye Tian's eyes, these Holy Soul Beasts were like ants, and they were easily killed by him in seconds.

As time passed, Ye Tian's soul holy light became more and more powerful, and more and more holy gifts were copied.

Decades later, on this day.

Ye Tian saw a giant black tree towering into the sky.

There were three fruits growing on this black giant tree, and Ye Tian could see at a glance that these three fruits were very extraordinary, not ordinary fruits.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian thought of the name of a treasure.

"Black Scale Holy Fruit, it is rumored that one Black Scale Holy Fruit can create an Invincible Domain Ancestor, but there are three Black Scale Holy Fruits here, which is enough to create three Invincible Domain Ancestors!

Ye Tian muttered.

In terms of value, the value of a Black Scale Holy Fruit is no less than that of the Soul Saint Realm Flower.

Before, Ye Tian swallowed the Soul Saint Realm Flower, which was originally a treasure for his wife, but now he saw this black-scaled holy fruit, which was just given to his wife, so that his wife could step into the Invincible Domain Ancestral Realm in the future.

"This black-scaled holy fruit belongs to me!"

Ye Tian flew over.

At this moment, he sensed the presence of a stone python.

By copying the talent, he discovered that this stone python was also one of the holy soul beasts, and there was also a holy gift called petrification.

In addition, its realm is not the Supreme Domain Ancestor, but the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

And not far from the stone python, three humanoid stone sculptures stood there.

"The three Supreme Domain Ancestors have been petrified!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

The Supreme Domain Ancestor who can enter here is naturally not weak, and the worst one is afraid that he has the strength of the first-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor, but he didn't expect that such a Supreme Domain Ancestor would be killed.

It can be seen from this that the strength of this stone python is very terrifying, and it is afraid that it has the invincible domain ancestor combat power of more than nine steps.

The stone python didn't make a move against Ye Tian, maybe he wouldn't have made a move if he didn't get close to its territory.

"Someone's coming!"

Ye Tian sensed it.

Whoa!!

The two Supreme Domain Ancestors appeared, very unfamiliar, Ye Tian had never seen them.

Through the exploration of the Copying Talent, he knew about the existence of these two Supreme Domain Ancestors.

"The Strongest Domain Ancestor of the Dark Holy Gate!"
